backward_compatibility.rationale: User confirmed Q1:A — no backward compat, old fill produces provably wrong results (dead checker stones). Re-enrich all puzzles with new frame.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Q6:A — remove offence_to_win parameter entirely, Q7:A — remove _choose_scan_order. Clean break.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous 6/6 panel approval. Full Rewrite + Validation Hardening. Only option meeting all 6 goals (G1-G6). User explicitly requested validation (Q5:A). Incremental cost (~40 lines over OPT-2) proportionate to correctness guarantee.
